summary: Crisp soundboard recording with a sublime Lightning > Supplication sequence
review: The Charlie Miller soundboard capture is praised for its clarity and crispness, standing out among his other releases. Musically the show shines in the Lightning > Supplication segment, which reviewers describe as sublime. Overall the recording is highly listenable, though only limited performance details are available.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments on sound quality (5 stars) and a standout song sequence, but only two brief reviews limit certainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp and clear audio; reviewer rates it 5/5 for sound quality and notes it sounds better than other Miller recordings.
